revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Nitta Shrine]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Auto-generated page using script written by Immanuelle, either as a placeholder redirect or to make bots recognize the page as made by Immanuelle
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Nitta_Shrine]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[Nitta Shrine]] to [[Nitta Shrine (Ōta)]]
[[WP:AES|←]]Removed redirect to [[Nitta Shrine (Ōta)]]
Convert [[Nitta Shrine (Ōta)]] to wikilink (The bot operation is completed 49.8% in total)
Changed interlanguage link to wikilink
cleanup per [[MOS:DAB]]
5 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Nitta_Shrine]]: Importing from English Wikipedia for the purposes of this wiki
added [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]][[en:subst:PAGENAME]] using [[Help:Gadget-HotCat|HotCat]]
revision.text:
'''Nitta Shrine''' may refer to:
* [[Nitta Shrine (Satsumasendai City)]] * [[Nitta Shrine (Ōta)]]
{{disambiguation}}
[[Category:Pages from wikipedia]][[en:subst:PAGENAME]]

* [[Nitta Shrine (Satsumasendai City)]] * [[Nitta Shrine (Ōta)]]

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:wikipedia>Renamed user g5s6n3yi8z7g08cs|wikipedia>Renamed user g5s6n3yi8z7g08cs]]
Undo imported revision [[Special:Diff/13629|13629]] by user [[:wikipedia:User:Renamed user g5s6n3yi8z7g08cs|wikipedia>Renamed user g5s6n3yi8z7g08cs]]

adding dd categories to flush out redirects that did not convert, and get small pages out of the queue

some pages here lack the tag but to my knowledge everything here eitherr is an original page or at least worth preserving while I potentially trirm the wikipedia derived articles

* [[Nitta Shrine (Satsumasendai City)]] * [[Nitta Shrine (Ōta)]] * {{ill|Nitta Shrine (Ota City)|ja|新田神社_(太田市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nitta Shrine (Ota City)|qq=}} * {{ill|Nitta Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|新田神社_(川崎市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nitta Shrine (Kawasaki City)|qq=}}

revision.comment: tagging these short pages for more work
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Nitta Shrine]][[ja:新田神社]][[simple:Nitta Shrine]][[zh:新田神社]]
'''Nitta Shrine''' may refer to:

* [[Nitta Shrine (Satsumasendai City)]]
* [[Nitta Shrine (Ōta)]]
* {{ill|Nitta Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|新田神社_(川崎市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nitta Shrine (Kawasaki City)|qq=}}
